design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate maze levels, destroy obstacles and enemies with bombs, collect power-ups, defeat bosses across themed worlds
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Spatial puzzle-solving combined with real-time avoidance of bomb blasts and enemy patterns
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Strategic bomb-placement tactician who methodically clears mazes while managing blast radius timing and spatial positioning
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Emphasizes deliberate, turn-based-feeling bomb placement mechanics over reflexive dodging. Introduces animal power-ups (Louies) and elemental-themed worlds that expand the core formula beyond pure maze destruction. Modernized White Bomberman design shifts from abstract to character-driven identity.

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Multiplayer modes allow emergent difficulty scaling based on number of players and skill variance; single-player progression through six themed areas with implicit difficulty escalation

progression.upgrade_system: Power-ups collected within levels: bomb capacity expansion, blast radius extension, movement speed, animal companions (Louies)
progression.unlock_mechanism: Sequential progression through six thematic worlds (Jammin' Jungle, Vexin' Volcano, Slammin' Sea, Crankin' Castle, Thrashin' Tundra, Bagular's Comet)
replayability_hooks: Multiplayer versus mode with up to 4 players (Genesis) or 5 players (PC Engine)
Different character skins (female, child, color variants)

world_building_techniques: Thematic world names reflect environmental aesthetics (Jungle, Volcano, Sea, Castle, Tundra, Comet)
Plot establishes villain Bagular and fragmented Planet Bomber across five spirit-themed regions
Elemental/environmental theming provides visual world-building through level design

faction_indicators: Multiple Bomberman character skins: white (protagonist), red, green, blue bombers; female and child variants
Animal companions (Louies) as collectible identity markers within levels
danger_signals: Evil Bagular and Robot Army as primary antagonistic force
Destruction of Spirit Pictures as catalyst for world fragmentation
Six distinct regions each potentially harboring different enemy types and environmental hazards
environmental_storytelling: Thematic level design: volcanic hazards in Vexin' Volcano, aquatic themes in Slammin' Sea, castle architecture in Crankin' Castle, arctic environment in Thrashin' Tundra
Artificial comet setting for final boss arena (Bagular's domain)
World fragmentation reflected in discrete regional progression structure
